## Summary

Describe the change in one or two short paragraphs.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] chore
- [ ] ci
- [ ] test

## Validation

- [ ] `bundle exec rake check_links`
- [ ] `bundle exec jekyll build --config _config.yml`

## Checklist

- [ ] My pull request title follows Conventional Commits.
- [ ] I tested the change locally.
- [ ] I updated the documentation when needed.

## Related issue

Closes #
